title: Tamil Nadu government formation news LIVE: Will Congress support be enough for Vijay to form govt? DMK leader weighs in
description: Tamil Nadu government formation news LIVE updates: DMK's Elangovan says Vijay’s TVK can’t form govt with Congress alone; hints AIADMK support may be needed, questions BJP’s role. Vijay presided over a meeting of its newly elected MLAs, a day after the party secured 108 seats in the elections.
